messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Is Confucius considered the author of the Zhuangzi?

No, Confucius is not considered the author of the Zhuangzi. The Zhuangzi (莊子) is attributed to Zhuangzi, a Daoist philosopher who lived in the 4th century BCE. Confucius and Zhuangzi represent quite different philosophical traditions — Confucianism and Daoism respectively — and while Confucius appears as a character in certain passages of the Zhuangzi, he is decidedly not its author.
